title: Hellion's API
description: An API mod for use in all of Hellion's projects!
body:
[![Use code "hellion" for 30% off at Nodecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/064a41cee40a5f8ccb427d77e611bd20f830f7fa.jpeg)](http://nodecraft.com/r/hellion)

An API for use with Hellion's mods. Allows for easy block, item, and entity registration.
